_note: Intelligence schema — building typologies, cost ratios, regulatory parameters. Grows independently of any project. The system's moat.
_status: skeleton — needs population from real project data

cost_ratios._note: ILS per sqm — Israeli market, to be verified against real bids

regulatory._note: Israeli municipal regulatory fingerprints — to be built out per municipality

spatial_patterns._note: Patterns that reliably pass permits or reliably cause problems — to be populated from real projects

quantity_ratios._note: Historical ratios for QTO confidence checking — e.g. concrete per sqm for a given typology
